_comment: Base label + translation tables, English · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026) · replaces raw Chinese characters everywhere in the day cell

比肩.label: Self
比肩.hint: A self-powered day — you can stand on your own two feet

劫財.label: Allies
劫財.hint: Extra strength from team and friends, but keep money matters crystal clear

食神.label: Joy
食神.hint: A day to relax, create, and take care of yourself

傷官.label: Ideas
傷官.hint: Thoughts run fast — show your stuff, but watch your words

正財.label: Steady Money
正財.hint: A day for regular income — real, countable, in hand

偏財.label: Windfall
偏財.hint: Floating money and special openings — well-connected people can help

正官.label: Duty
正官.hint: A day for formal business, order, seniors, and reputation

七殺.label: Pressure
七殺.hint: A high-pressure day — sharp decisions, head-on challenges

正印.label: Recharge
正印.hint: A day for learning, recovery, credentials, and kind mentors

偏印.label: Instinct
偏印.hint: Hunches run clear — think from odd angles, go deep

建.label: Begin Day
建.hint: Start new things — plant the first stake

除.label: Clear-Out Day
除.hint: Wash out the old, cut the clutter, begin treatment

平.label: Steady Day
平.hint: Routine runs smooth — negotiate as equals

定.label: Settle Day
定.hint: Agree, book, and tie things down firmly

執.label: Follow-Through Day
執.hint: Handle the details, chase pending work, grip tight

破.label: Breaker Day
破.hint: Only for tearing down and ending things — skip anything auspicious

危.label: Caution Day
危.hint: Move slowly, avoid risk — a day for stillness and review

成.label: Success Day
成.hint: Bring things to a beautiful finish — unveil the results

收.label: Harvest Day
收.hint: Gather the returns, the money, and the goods

開.label: Open Day
開.hint: Launch, open the market, start learning, fire it up

閉.label: Rest Day
閉.hint: Close the cycle, seal the leaks, rest and recharge

lunarDay.hint: Day of the lunar month, counted 1-30
